Name: Open Seal
Description: The werewolf coaxes a spirit to open a physically locked or barred lid, door, or seal. Electronic locks present progressively higher Difficulties, as do devices sealed by mystical means. A raccoon-spirit grants this Gift.
System: Purely mechanical locks or bars open automatically when this Gift is employed. Electronic or supernatural devices requirea Manipulation + Honor test versusa Difficulty set by the Storyteller (2 for a regular electronic lock, 5 for a sorcerously augmented fingerprint scanner). Some extremely advanced locks might even be beyond this Gift’s ability to open, at the Storyteller’s discretion. This Gift can also be used in homid form.
